name: rubric semver checker rejects a non-semver version string in RUBRIC.yaml
command: mkdir -p rubric && printf 'version: 1.2\n' > rubric/RUBRIC.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/version-check.sh" --rubric rubric/RUBRIC.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_semver' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
